title: thelypodium crispum
intro: Thelypodium crispum, also known as crispum or thelypodium, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in dry to moist areas of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Thelypodium crispum include relief from skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Thelypodium crispum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
